is a fictional character from the Neon Genesis Evangelion: ANIMA novel. 

Profile

History

Neon Genesis Evangelion: ANIMA

Volume 1

In Neon Genesis Evangelion: ANIMA, after the attack on the NERV Headquarters by the Mass Production Evangelions and their subsequent destruction, he was inside the Chronostatic Sphere and therefore was considered MIA (Missing In Action).
